descriptionKey.english: Gain [avarice] [effect0.upgrade.status0.power]. [celebrate]: Gain [avarice] [effect0.power] permanently. For every [effect1.power][coin] spent, gain +[effect2.power][attack].
descriptionKey.french: Octroie <nobr>[avarice] [effect0.upgrade.status0.power].</nobr> <nobr>[celebrate] :</nobr> octroie <nobr>[avarice] [effect0.power]</nobr> définitivement. Par tranche de [effect1.power][coin] dépensées, octroie +[effect2.power][attack].
